zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Grenville於1211年之前出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯時，他的父親Gerald de Grenville28歲，母親Dionysia de Turberville24歲。他於大約1250年與Christina Lancelas在英國巴金哈姆爾沃頓 安德伍德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1289年。

nameMeanings.name: Grenville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Grainville-la-Teinturière in Seine-Maritime, France.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When William de Grenville was born before 1211, in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Gerald de Grenville, was 28 and his mother, Dionysia de Turberville, was 24. He married Christina Lancelas about 1250, in Wotton Underwood, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1289.

Il a épousé Christina Lancelas environ 1250, à Wotton Underwood, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1289.

ko.lifeSummary: William de Grenville(이)가 1211년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 미턴 케인스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gerald de Grenville(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Dionysia de Turberville(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1250년 영국 벅잉함실르 보턴 운더우드에서 Christina Lancelas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1289년 사망했다.
